name: Olive Garden Breadsticks
recipeIngredient: 1 Unfrozen bread, thawed in a bowl at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. When the dough is soft enough to knead, lightly coat your fingers with Pam or oil.
2. Knead the dough just until it can be shaped into cigar-sized pieces (about 8 to 10).
3. Place the pieces about 3 inches apart on Pam-sprayed cookie sheets.
4. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1-1/2 hours.
5. Holding Pam about 8 inches from the sticks, lightly spray the top of each one.
6. Dust with garlic powder and oregano leaves.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve within a day or two.
